programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Alvo - T01E33
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara percebe a presença de Deidara e começa uma batalha aérea na areia. O jonin da areia é Yura, um agente da Akatsuki, e a Aldeia da Areia sofre danos. Na Aldeia da Folha, Naruto e Sakura veem o incrível poder de Kakashi. A dupla dá seu golpe final. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Formação! A Nova Equipe Kakashi - T01E34
programme.desc: 2007. Naruto e Sakura derrotam Kakashi. Tsunade os nomeia como uma equipe de três liderados por Kakashi, dizendo que agora são todos iguais. Gaara e Deidara continuam sua batalha. Baki fica preocupado que o shukaku se materialize, mas Kankuro ri da ideia. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Adição Indesejada - T01E35
programme.desc: 2007. Para proteger sua aldeia da argila explosiva de Deidara, Gaara usa seu chakra para criar um escudo. A aldeia é salva a um enorme custo. Gaara fica vulnerável. As tentativas de seus companheiros são inúteis, e Gaara acaba caindo nas mãos de Deidara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Falso Sorriso - T01E36
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara é arrastado para longe por Deidara. Kankuro sai com um pelotão para salvar Gaara, mas os Akatsuki haviam instalado armadilhas engenhosas. Determinado, Kankuro encontra sozinho os Akatsuki. A nova equipe de Naruto comemora sua primeira missão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sem Título - T01E37
programme.desc: 2007. Temari encontra Kakashi e sua equipe. Naruto explode de raiva pelos Akatsuki. Como também hospeda uma besta de cauda dentro de si, Naruto entende o que Gaara está sofrendo. Kankuro é infectado por um veneno. Sem um antídoto, ele terá poucos dias de vida. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Simulação - T01E38
programme.desc: 2007. Chega uma mensagem da Aldeia da Areia sobre o sequestro do Kazekage. Tsunade manda a equipe Kakashi para a aldeia. Kankuro começa a batalha contra os Akatsuki, mas as táticas dos bonecos não funcionam. Seu oponente foi quem desenvolveu essas táticas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Ponte Tenchi - T01E39
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas tentam salvar Kankuro. Vovó Chiyo, perita em veneno, é chamada. Uma tempestade de areia atrasa Naruto, Sakura e Kakashi. Tsunade se preocupa e envia Guy e sua equipe. O akatsuki e Gaara começam o jutsu de selamento e os nove dragões fantasmas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Nove Caudas Se Liberta - T01E40
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata Kankuro, deixando todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. Vovó Chiyo fica emocionada por Tsunade ter enviado sua própria aprendiz e pela determinação de Sakura. Kankuro fornece informações sobre os Akatsuki. Kakashi envia um cão de caça ninja. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia - T01E41
programme.sub-title: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos Akatsuki. Temari recebe ordens para ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó Chiyo se oferece para ficar no lugar de Temari. Naruto e Sakura ficam chocados com a história das bestas de cauda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Orochimaru Versus Jinchuriki - T01E42
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi encontra Itachi Uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Guy e sua equipe começam a lutar contra um amargo rival, Kisame, que lança um poderoso chakra para subjugar o ninja da folha. Seu jutsu aprisiona Neji, Lee e Tenten. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lágrimas De Sakura - T01E43
programme.desc: 2008. Guy se arrepende ao ver seus três alunos presos. Determinado a parar Kisame, Guy o desafia usando o nunchaku. Sem oxigênio, Tenten vai ficando fraca, e Guy se prepara para usar um jutsu secreto e proibido. Naruto cai no genjutsu de Itachi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Da Batalha - T01E44
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo e Sakura salvam Naruto do genjutsu de Itachi. Kakashi começa um contra-ataque e exibe toda sua destreza. Guy enfrenta dificuldades contra Kisame, mas o derrota com um poderoso jutsu. Os ninjas da folha conseguem derrotar seu arquiminigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Consequências Da Traição - T01E45
programme.desc: 2008. Kisame e Itachi parecem ter sido clones cujos poderes foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. Vovó Chiyo explica a conexão entre a besta de cauda e o jinchuriki. Sakura percebe que Naruto enfrenta o mesmo destino e lágrimas escorrem em seu rosto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pesadelo - T02E54
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: 2001. A partida decisiva das finais dos torneios americanos se resume a Max vs. Michael, do 'All Starz', em uma batalha que coloca ciência e tecnologia contra o espírito humano. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E28

programme.title: 2001. Depois de derrotar por pouco o All Starz no Torneio Americano, Kenny decide que ele deve registrar um banco de dados dos pontos altos e baixos dos BladeBreakers desde o início. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E29

programme.title: 2001. Viajando de barco pelo Atlântico, os Bladebreakers devem não apenas lidar com o enjoo de Kenny, mas uma revelação devastadora. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E30

programme.title: 2001. As crianças são levadas a perder o barco, forçando-as a passar a noite em Londres, onde uma misteriosa fita de vídeo do pai de Tyson é entregue a eles. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E31

programme.title: 2001. Depois que seu trem é misteriosamente sequestrado, as crianças se encontram nos recessos escuros de um túnel. É aqui que os Bladebreakers encontram um grupo de fantasmas zumbis, os Dark Bladers. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E32

programme.title: 2001. Enquanto os Bladebreakers vão para o Campeonato do Mundo na Rússia, eles ficam presos em Paris, onde acabam perdendo um dia procurando Kai que desapareceu misteriosamente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Toshifumi Kawase
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E33

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers passam um dia extra em Paris e se separam para ver os pontos turísticos. Ray alcança seu tio, Max faz uma farra de compras e Kai procura informações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E34

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers chegam a Roma, procurando pelo misterioso Enrique. Zombando do desafio de Beyblade, Enrique decide que prefere passar o dia com algumas de suas amigas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E35

programme.title: 2001. Não querendo deixar sua derrota inicial para Enrique o perturbar, Tyson fica ocupado refazendo seu Beyblade. Com Enrique duvidando de sua própria técnica, e Oliver visitando-o da França em Roma, o cenário está pronto para uma revanche. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E36

programme.title: 2001. Enrique e Oliver decidem levar nossos heróis em um passeio dirigível para visitar o castelo de Robert. O motivo - Tyson espera vingar uma perda anterior para Robert que aconteceu a bordo do navio que chegou à Europa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E37

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers se sentiram em casa na mansão de Robert, recusando-se a sair, a menos que os europeus concordassem em um Beybattle final. Para ensinar uma lição a seus convidados, Robert concorda em uma partida em seu novo estádio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E38

programme.title: 2001. A segunda partida começa no Olympia Coliseum e, com os dois lutadores recebendo ajuda não solicitada de seus respectivos companheiros de equipe, Kai consegue derrotar Johnny. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.sub-title: Uma batalha majestosa uma vitória majestosa
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E39

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers chegam a Moscou em antecipação ao torneio final do World Beyblading. Enquanto procuram seu hotel na cidade fria, eles encontram Boris, um homem estranho que afirma ser o chefe de um centro de treinamento de Beyblading. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.sub-title: Batalha quente em uma cidade fria
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E40

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers encontram alguns velhos amigos na Rússia quando All Starz e o White Tiger Clan aparecem para uma partida de exibição. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E41

programme.title: 2001. Kai está dividido entre escapar da Abadia, agora conhecida como Biovolt Corporation (sigla para Beybladers com intenção de vitória sobre a tirania sem lei), ou explorá-la ainda mais na tentativa de desvendar memórias esquecidas de sua infância. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E42

programme.title: 2001. É o primeiro dia do Beyblade World Championships em Moscou e, quando os Bladebreakers deixam o hotel, eles ainda não conseguiram localizar Kai que está desaparecido há algum tempo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E43

programme.title: 2001. Determinados a vingar a derrota devastadora do All Starz, os Tigres Brancos são os próximos a enfrentar o Neo Borg no Torneio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E44

programme.title: 2001. Enquanto os Bladebreakers se preparam para as finais, eles são abordados por um homem de terno que lhes diz que Kai exige encontrá-los em um lago Baikal congelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E45

programme.title: 2001. Agora que Kai finalmente é leal aos Bladebreakers, ele devolve o Black Dranzer a Boris, causando sérios danos à sede inimiga no processo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E46

programme.title: 2001. Os Bladebreakers estão presos na estéril Tundra Russa após seu encontro com o Neo Borg, quando Oliver e Enrique misteriosamente aparecem em um ônibus. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E47

programme.title: 2001. As finais do campeonato mundial estão prestes a começar e Kai insiste em Beybattling primeiro, esperando que seu conhecimento do Neo Borg lhe dê uma vantagem sobre o primeiro lutador do Neo Borg, Serge. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E48

programme.title: 2001. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi

programme.title: 2001. Depois de uma partida devastadora colocar Rei no hospital, Takao treina seu coração para se preparar para sua batalha contra Yuri, líder dos Neo Borg. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E50

programme.title: 2001. Sin contacto con el mundo exterior, aunque las cámaras de transmisión aún pueden capturar imágenes de alguna manera a través de la gruesa pared de hielo, comienza la segunda ronda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi

programme.title: 2023. Só falta um minuto de duelo, até que o perdedor seja enviado para afundar nas profundezas do mar! Será que estes grandes amigos levarão um ao outro à perdição? Pode ser que haja uma salvadora especial, que acabou de recuperar a visão... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E29

programme.title: 2023. É a batalha dos espectros, e Bakura libera seu exército de fantasmas contra os zumbis devotos de Bonz, em busca do direito de entrar nos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas! Mas para quem o sino final tocará quando este duelo se der no Reino das Sombras? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E30

programme.title: 2023. É o jogo do amor, quando o galã de Hollywood Jean-Claude Magnum desafia Mai para um duelo para ganhar sua mão em casamento! Será que Mai sucumbirá ao charme de Jean-Claude, para não mencionar sua esquadra de monstros-ninja? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E31

programme.title: 2023. Que comecem os Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas! A habilidade e resistência dos oito finalistas serão testadas ao extremo em uma arena de duelos suspensa a 300 metros de altura! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E32

programme.title: 2023. É o primeiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, e Yugi luta contra o espírito maligno do Anel do Milênio, que possui Bakura! Yugi destrói os espectros grotescos de Bakura rapidamente, mas Bakura tem uma estratégia saída direto do cemitério... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E33

programme.title: 2023. Bakura aciona a Tábua do Destino, que fará Yugi perder automaticamente em cinco turnos! Como se isso já não fosse ruim, o Santuário das Trevas de Bakura afeta os pontos de vida de Yugi a cada ataque! Incapaz de atacar e ficando sem tempo, Yugi está preso! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E34

programme.title: 2023. Slifer, o Dragão Celeste de Yugi expelirá seu último sopro e vencerá o duelo, mas Bakura poderá não sobreviver a rajada do todo-poderoso Monstro Deus Egípcio! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E35

programme.title: 2023. A origem das Cartas dos Deuses Egípcios é finalmente revelada! O misterioso Shadi leva Yugi a uma jornada de volta à criação de Duel Monsters... e os perigosos poderes com ela liberados! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E36

programme.title: 2023. No segundo dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, Odion, disfarçado de Marik, confunde Joey com várias armadilhas. No entanto, Joey tem Tornado Gigante, a defesa perfeita para a estratégia de Odion, que garante a vitória de Joey... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E37

programme.title: 2023. A Encarnação de Apophis de Odion destrói brutalmente os monstros de Joey... e seus pontos de vida! Será que Joey pode usar eficientemente os monstros que ele ganhou antes, ou já está afobado demais para montar um contra-ataque bem-sucedido? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E38

programme.title: 2023. É uma verdadeira comilança, e a Serket de Odion devora os monstros de Joey, mutando para estágios de evolução mais e mais poderosos! Como Joey pode derrotar a Serket se ela engole os monstros de Joey quando eles são invocados? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E39

programme.title: 2023. Odion usa uma Carta Deus Egípcio falsa para invocar o terceiro Monstro Deus Egípcio, o Dragão Alado de Rá, e o usa para aniquilar o resto dos pontos de vida de Joey. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E40

programme.title: 2023. O terceiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, entre Mai e Marik, não é nada ordinário. É uma batalha no temido Reino das Sombras, onde perder pontos de vida equivale a perder memórias! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E41

programme.title: 2023. Ao passo que Mai perde mais e mais memórias com o ataque implacável de Marik, ela perde confiança em suas habilidades para duelar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E42

programme.title: 2023. Mai ganha controle do Dragão Alado de Rá de Marik, mas é incapaz de decifrar como liberar suas habilidades extremamente poderosas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E43

programme.title: 2023. No quarto dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, o oponente misterioso de Kaiba é... Ishizu! Com o poder de seu Colar do Milênio, Ishizu pode ver o futuro, inclusive cada carta que Kaiba está planejando jogar! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Um Duelo Contra o Destino: Kaiba vs. Ishizu, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E44

programme.title: 2023. Usando a mágica de seu Colar do Milênio, Ishizu já viu o resultado do duelo – ela derrotará Kaiba com sua armadilha! Como Kaiba pode vencer quando ele já está destinado a perder? É hora de Kaiba mudar o futuro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Um Duelo Contra o Destino: Kaiba vs. Ishizu, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E45

programme.title: 2023. Com a maldade de Marik crescendo, Ishizu revela os segredos da linhagem dela: como Marik passou a ser, de uma criança generosa, um tirano em busca de poder e do domínio mundial? Será que Yugi pode salvar Marik, ou ele está além da salvação? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: 2008. Raimon Junior High está mais forte do que nunca, mas o mesmo acontece com as forças contra eles. Mas tão desesperados são seus inimigos para impedi-los de ter sucesso a qualquer custo, eles cruzam a linha e se expõem sem querer! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E10

programme.title: 2008. O grande jogo contra o Teikoku está a apenas alguns dias, mas, a menos que Raimon consiga encontrar um novo treinador, eles estarão fora sem sequer pisar em campo! Toda a equipe está olhando alto e baixo, eles vão encontrar um ou não. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E11

programme.title: 2008. Raimon chega à Academia Teikoku para o maior jogo de suas vidas, mas antes que eles possam começar, eles precisam dissipar a nuvem de suspeita que paira sobre o lugar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A final com o Instituto Imperial Parte 1
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E12

programme.title: 2009. Com Kageyama fechado com segurança, o jogo contra Teikoku começou corretamente, e é um jogo real desta vez. Quem ganha isso sai por cima. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A final com o Instituto Imperial Parte 2
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E13

programme.title: 2009. Raimon ainda não acredita que derrotou Teikoku e é o novo campeão do distrito. Depois que a poeira comemorativa se instala, uma figura misteriosa entra no bar de ramen de Hibiki. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E14

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está de olho no torneio nacional e está determinado a vencê-lo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E15

programme.title: 2009. Com Kazemaru ainda na equipe, por enquanto, Raimon pode avançar e se concentrar nos nacionais. E eles precisarão o primeiro jogo é contra a rápida Sengoku Igajima Junior High. Se não vencerem, o sonho acaba antes mesmo de começar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E16

programme.title: 2009. A estreita vitória sobre Sengoku Igajima deu a Raimon confiança, mas do outro lado do torneio, todo mundo está chocado com a derrota completa de Teikoku nas mãos da Zeus Junior High, que é 10-0. O que Kidou deve fazer. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E17

programme.title: 2009. Com seu poder de fogo impulsionado pela adição de Kidou Yuuto, a equipe está pronta para enfrentar o Senbayama Junior High e sua defesa inquebrável. Mas, a menos que eles tenham seu passe coordenado, todo o seu trabalho árduo não dará em nada. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E18

programme.title: 2009. Ichinose Kazuya está de volta! Como uma fênix, ele ressuscitou das cinzas e voltou para visitar seus velhos amigos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E19

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está se preparando para enfrentar seu próximo grande oponente, Kidokawa Seishuu, que por acaso é a velha escola de Gouenji. Certos membros dessa equipe ainda guardam rancor contra ele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A técnica definitiva o triângulo Z
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E20

programme.title: 2009. Os trigêmeos Mukata e seu rancor domina Raimon a cada passo, mas eles precisam encontrar a força para superar sua malícia se quiserem chegar à final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E21

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Junior High chegou à final, mas todos estão ficando nervosos por jogar o aterrorizante Zeus Junior High. Endou está convencido de que não é bom o suficiente. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E22

programme.title: 2009. À medida que as finais contra Zeus se aproximam, o mesmo acontece com a expectativa e o medo de Raimon. A equipe está trabalhando duro, mas o nível a ser atingido parece estar além do alcance deles. Eles chegarão a tempo da final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E23

programme.title: 2009. O grande jogo com Zeus está quase em cima deles, mas Endou ainda não domina Majin The Hand. O treinador Hibiki decide que todos passem a noite na escola em um campo de treinamento para a festa do pijama. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. É isso, chegou a final do Nacional. O Zeus Junior High venceu rapidamente e nada que o Raimon Junior High faça tenha efeito neles. Eles são realmente deuses. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E25

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Junior High está abaixo de três gols e está sendo derrotado pelos deuses do futebol do Zeus Junior High. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E26

programme.title: 2009. A vitória de Raimon prova ter uma vida muito curta, pois apenas alguns minutos após a vitória o céu cai. De repente, a terra é invadida por alienígenas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Good Fortune
programme.desc: A well-meaning but inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist. Starring Seth Rogen, Aziz Ansari, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: A man (Keanu Reeves) who can see demons helps a skeptical policewoman (Rachel Weisz) investigate her twin sisters mysterious death. Starring Keanu Reeves, Rachel Weisz, Shia LaBeouf.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) and his estranged son (Jai Courtney) must put aside their differences and work together to get a Russian whistleblower to safety and thwart a disastrous crime in Chernobyl. Starring Bruce Willis, Jai Courtney, Sebastian Koch.

programme.title: Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: An unhappy car dealer (Bruce Willis) believes that a dime-store author/philosopher (Albert Finney) has the answers to lifes important questions. Starring Bruce Willis, Albert Finney, Nick Nolte.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: The stories of several Filipina caregivers and nannies in Vancouver, that bear witness to their sacrifices as they struggle to reunite with their children and families.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: Two elfin beings search for the missing shard to an all-powerful crystal that can save their world from evil. Starring John Baddeley, Stephen Garlick, David Buck.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: In 1935 archaeologist Jones (Harrison Ford), a lounge singer (Kate Capshaw) and a Chinese orphan (Ke Huy Quan) search for mystical stones stolen from an Indian tribe. Starring Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: Archaeologist Jones (Harrison Ford) rescues his kidnapped father (Sean Connery), and the two race the Nazis to find the Holy Grail. Starring Harrison Ford, Sean Connery, Denholm Elliott.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Indy (Harrison Ford) and a young adventurer (Shia La Beouf) must ferret out a powerful artifact and keep it out of the hands of a deadly Soviet agent (Cate Blanchett). Starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An entrepreneur invites scientists (Sam Neill, Laura Dern), a mathematics theorist (Jeff Goldblum) and others to his jungle theme-park featuring dinosaurs regenerated from DNA. Starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite.

programme.title: The BMF Documentary: Blowing Money Fast
programme.desc: By 2005, law enforcement is closing in on BMF, forcing Terry underground; as the empire collapses, the brothers face life sentences; years later, Terry reflects on their choices, redemption, and the lasting impact of BMF as he begins a new chapter.

Mercer is trying to rebuild his life and his relationship with his son amid the turbulent Los Angeles riots in 1992. Across town, another father and son put their own strained relationship to the test as they plan a risky heist where Mercer works. Starring Tyrese Gibson, Ray Liotta, Scott Eastwood.

programme.title: Never Let Go
programme.desc: When an unspeakable evil takes over the world, the only protection for a mother and her twin sons is their house and strong bond. Needing to stay connected at all times, they tether themselves with ropes, clinging to one another and never letting go. Starring Halle Berry, Anthony B. Jenkins, Percy Daggs.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brothers mysterious death. Starring Scott Eastwood, Mel Gibson, Tyrese Gibson.

programme.title: Honk for Jesus. Save Your Soul
programme.desc: After a scandal rocks their megachurch, a woman and her husband must rebuild their congregation and reconcile their faith by all means necessary to make the biggest comeback that commodified religion has ever seen. Starring Regina Hall, Sterling K. Brown, Austin Crute.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community. Starring Ed Oxenbould, Avan Jogia, Justin Hartley.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Kate are hijacked by armed thugs while transporting Abnormals. But before the gunmen get what they want, an old Abnormal friend, seeking safe harbor, attaches itself to Kate, endowing her with super powers.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry travel to the UK to follow up on a werewolf sighting and end up uncovering a dark connection to Henrys past and future.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Passport to Paris
programme.desc: Eager to see Paris but tired of their chaperon, identical twins (Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen) tour France with two French teenagers. Starring Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen, Peter White.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Adopted by the Littles (Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki), a mouse has various adventures which make him appreciate love and family. Starring Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballets first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

Starring Cierra Ramirez, Angelique Rivera, Gregg Sulkin.

programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing. Starring Clint Eastwood, Hilary Swank, Morgan Freeman.

programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town thats controlled by the Roman Catholic Church. Starring Cillian Murphy, Eileen Walsh, Michelle Fairley.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: A young photographer uncovers a dark secret when he meets his girlfriends seemingly friendly parents for the first time at their posh estate. Starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Catherine Keener.

programme.desc: Former GFE Bria Jones enters the witness protection program in order to escape an abusive relationship.

programme.desc: Bria disobeys orders to lay low and meets with a new client.

programme.desc: Joyce and Doug head to Vegas to sell the international rights to Minx; at Bottom Dollar, Tina aims to let loose and host a watch party for the Billie Jean King vs. Bobby Riggs tennis match.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.desc: Magnus is trapped inside an abandoned building when she responds to an anonymous call for help; she learns the caller had a very different agenda.

programme.desc: With Adam Worth under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus discloses the turbulent beginnings he shares with The Five.

programme.desc: In order to save his home, an ogre along with a donkey makes a deal with a mean lord to rescue a beautiful princess. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

In 1946, Branch Rickey (Harrison Ford), general manager of the Brooklyn Dodgers, signs Jackie Robinson (Chadwick Boseman) to the team in defiance of major league baseballs notorious color barrier. Starring Chadwick Boseman, Harrison Ford, Nicole Beharie.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria expands the boundaries of the GFE in order to fulfill her needs.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: With an impending trial date, Ian attempts to rein Bria in by stepping up his surveillance.

programme.title: Goon

programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: The queen of Egypt (Elizabeth Taylor) seduces Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison), but when he is killed, she uses Mark Antony (Richard Burton) as her new protector. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Richard Burton, Rex Harrison.

programme.desc: Presented as originally released in 1939. Includes themes and character depictions which may be offensive and problematic to contemporary audiences. programme.title: Doctor Zhivago
programme.desc: The Russian Revolution forms the backdrop for this tale of a sensitive Russian physician (Omar Sharif) who is torn between his loyal, long-suffering wife (Geraldine Chaplin) and the great love (Julie Christie) of his life. Starring Omar Sharif, Julie Christie, Geraldine Chaplin.

programme.title: Quo Vadis
programme.desc: Emperor Nero (Peter Ustinov) burns Rome and puts a Roman commanders (Robert Taylor) Christian bride (Deborah Kerr) in the arena with a bull. Starring Robert Taylor, Deborah Kerr, Peter Ustinov.

programme.title: Battleground
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers (Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban) from all over fight in the Battle of the Bulge. Starring Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban.

programme.title: Sergeant York
programme.desc: A Tennessean becomes one of World War Is most decorated heroes by single-handedly capturing a German position. Starring Gary Cooper, Walter Brennan, Joan Leslie.

programme.title: The Story of G.I. Joe
programme.desc: During World War II, American journalist Ernie Pyle (Burgess Meredith) goes abroad to write about the arduous experiences of stalwart members of the U.S. Army. Starring Burgess Meredith, Robert Mitchum, Freddie Steele.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: A Marine sergeant (John Wayne) pushes a colonels son (John Agar) and other recruits until theyre ready to fight. Starring John Wayne, John Agar, Forrest Tucker.

programme.desc: A British POW colonel (Alec Guinness) orders his men to build their Japanese captor (Sessue Hayakawa) a railway bridge in the jungle. Starring William Holden, Alec Guinness, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: Flamboyant Gen. George S. Patton (George C. Scott) receives accolades and censure as he fights World War II. Starring George C. Scott, Karl Malden, David Bauer.

programme.title: The Deer Hunter
programme.desc: The horrors of Vietnam affect three Pennsylvania steelworkers (Robert De Niro, Christopher Walken, John Savage), lifelong friends who serve together. Starring Robert De Niro, Christopher Walken, John Savage.

programme.title: Das Boot
programme.desc: The captain (Jurgen Prochnow) and crew of a World War II U-boat follow incredible orders under claustrophobic conditions. Starring Jurgen Prochnow, Herbert Gronemeyer, Klaus Wennemann.

programme.desc: Heroic PT boat captains (Robert Montgomery, John Wayne) fight Japanese ships in the World War II Philippines. Starring Robert Montgomery, John Wayne, Donna Reed.

programme.title: White Shadows in the South Seas
programme.desc: A doctor (Monte Blue) tries to save an island beauty (Raquel Torres) and her tribe from corruption by a pearl trader (Robert Anderson). Starring Monte Blue, Raquel Torres, Robert Anderson.

programme.desc: Whaling brothers (Robert Taylor, Stewart Granger) sail the 19th-century South Seas, where black pearls and a woman (Ann Blyth) bring mutiny. Starring Robert Taylor, Stewart Granger, Ann Blyth.

programme.desc: Animators Max and Dave Fleischers adaptation of Jonathan Swifts classic about a shipwrecked Englishman in Lilliput. Starring Lanny Ross, Pinto Colvig, Jessica Dragonette.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: Daniel Defoes British sailor (Dan OHerlihy) is shipwrecked for 28 years with cannibals, and his man Friday (Jaime Fernández). Starring Dan OHerlihy, Jaime Fernández, Felipe de Alba.

programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: A New England missionary (Max von Sydow) and his bride (Julie Andrews) bring Christianity to 1820s Hawaii. Starring Julie Andrews, Max von Sydow, Richard Harris.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Lassie Come Home
programme.desc: An English boys (Roddy McDowall) collie finds her way back home from Scotland after his father (Donald Crisp) sells her to a duke. Starring Roddy McDowall, Donald Crisp, Dame May Whitty.

programme.title: Come Back, Little Sheba
programme.desc: A housewife (Shirley Booth) and her alcoholic husband (Burt Lancaster) rent a spare room to a pretty student (Terry Moore). Starring Burt Lancaster, Shirley Booth, Terry Moore.

programme.title: The Awful Truth
programme.desc: Spouses (Irene Dunne, Cary Grant) try to spoil each others chances for romance before their divorce becomes final in 90 days. Starring Irene Dunne, Cary Grant, Ralph Bellamy.

programme.title: Umberto D
programme.desc: A lonely old man struggles to maintain his dignity while leading a meager existence with his dog as his only companion. Starring Carlo Battisti, Maria-Pia Casilio, Lina Gennari.

programme.title: Sounder
programme.desc: A sharecroppers (Paul Winfield) wife (Cicely Tyson) keeps the family together after he goes to prison in 1930s Louisiana. Starring Cicely Tyson, Paul Winfield, Kevin Hooks.

programme.title: Disraeli
programme.desc: The prime minister of Great Britain makes a decision to purchase the Suez Canal despite opposing pressures. Starring George Arliss, Joan Bennett, Anthony Bushell.

programme.title: Viva Villa!
programme.desc: Mexican bandit Pancho Villa (Wallace Beery) and his gang join the peasant army in revolution. Starring Wallace Beery, Leo Carrillo, Fay Wray.

programme.title: The Private Life of Henry VIII

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: The 18th-century Austrian princess (Norma Shearer) has an affair with a Swedish count (Tyrone Power) and becomes queen of France. Starring Norma Shearer, Tyrone Power, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Julius Caesar
programme.desc: Shakespeares Brutus (James Mason), Cassius (John Gielgud) and others plot the Roman rulers death, but Mark Antony (Marlon Brando) avenges it. Starring Marlon Brando, James Mason, John Gielgud.

programme.title: Sunrise at Campobello
programme.desc: Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Ralph Bellamy) fights polio and enters politics with his wife, Eleanor (Greer Garson). Starring Ralph Bellamy, Greer Garson, Hume Cronyn.

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: A Scotland Yard detective (Joseph Cotten) figures out why a schizoid Victorian (Charles Boyer) is trying to drive his wife (Ingrid Bergman) mad. Starring Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Imitation of Life
programme.desc: An aspiring actress and her black housekeeper retain a solid friendship despite problems with their teenage daughters. Starring Lana Turner, John Gavin, Sandra Dee.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Being Bernie Mac
programme.desc: Bernie must baby-sit for Bryana and deal with Jordan, who was sent home from school for pulling a fire alarm unnecessarily.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Overdrive
programme.desc: Bernie has no patience when trying to teach Vanessa to drive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - My Privacy
programme.desc: Bernie realizes Bryana and Jordan are too old to share a room, so he moves her in with Vanessa, who is less than thrilled.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Who Gives This Bride
programme.desc: Bernies sister, Benita, announces her plans to elope in Las Vegas; Wanda offers her the Mac residence as a wedding site.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nerdy Mac
programme.desc: Bryanas standardized test scores prompt Bernie to send her to Jordans school, but she is so far behind that they threaten to move her back a grade.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stone Nuts
programme.desc: Jordan tries to fit in with the popular crowd; after taking Bernies advice, he winds up losing his lunch money in a poker game.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: Ellipse Fit by LegXercise-FREE Deluxe Offer for First 300 Callers!
programme.desc: Do you spend too many hours sitting at a desk? Do you have a tough time exercising due to joint pain? Ellipse Fit will strengthen your legs, boost mobility, and improve circulation with low impact leg movement. Order NOW And claim your FREE Bonus!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Chaos to Calm - Princess Perfect
programme.desc: Kids closets are often neglected or seen as unimportant, but the ladies of The Order Project believe that is a mistake; as moms, they are all about teaching their kids order, appreciation and respect for both themselves and their things.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Between Sisters
programme.desc: A bride and her sister set out to find their newly discovered siblings in order to invite them to the wedding.

programme.title: Discarded Things
programme.desc: An esteemed music professor is thrown out of her lavish academic world and into the harsh reality of teaching at-risk youth.

programme.title: In the Meantime
programme.desc: Soon to be married, a bride (Kali Hawk) finds that her friendship with a fellow volunteer (Darrin Dewitt Henson) at an adult-literacy program is developing into something much more intense.

programme.title: From the Rough
programme.desc: Catana Starks (Taraji P. Henson) becomes the first woman to coach a collegiate mens golf team and subsequently guides her misfit players to an all-time-record championship season.

programme.title: Grandmas House
programme.desc: A young woman recounts how her life changed after she moved in with her grandmother.

programme.title: Lyfes Journey
programme.desc: A family man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. Now he must start a journey to forgiveness that will bring him back to love, family and faith.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Jack And Jacqueline
programme.desc: Wanda urges Vanessa to join an enrichment organization she once belonged to; they learn times have changed when Vanessa and her new friends are charged with shoplifting.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Manchild in Vanessa Land
programme.desc: Bernie learns Vanessa has a boyfriend, Rahim, who is 18 years old; when he discovers that the teen has a child, he hits the ceiling.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Dont Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squads provocative routines.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - I Dont Wanna Be a Playa No More
programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Texas Southern University

programme.title: Changing Lanes (2002)
programme.desc: An attorney and a recovering alcoholic have a car accident which swiftly escalates into an ongoing, bitter feud.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Barrons Cove (2024)
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his sons death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, hes left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Wildcat (2021)
programme.desc: A captive reporter must figure out a way to escape from the militants who ambushed her convoy in the Middle East.

programme.title: The Bye Bye Man (2017)
programme.desc: A couple (Douglas Smith, Cressida Bonas) and their friend (Lucien Laviscount) stumble upon the horrific origins of the Bye Bye Man (Doug Jones), a mysterious figure that they discover is the root cause of the evil behind the most unspeakable acts.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Drop Zone (1994)
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal (Wesley Snipes) turns skydiver to nab a hijacker (Gary Busey) and his parachutist gang planning to invade the DEA.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.sub-title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: A law-school grad uncovers a sinister secret about the Tennessee firm that made him an offer he couldnt refuse.

programme.title: Cop Land (1997)
programme.desc: The sheriff (Sylvester Stallone) of a small New Jersey police community confronts key men (Harvey Keitel, Ray Liotta) on both sides of a law-enforcement cover-up.

programme.title: Serpico (1973)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Frank Serpico, who sacrificed his career to expose widespread corruption in the NYPD.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, and they join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer and Uncut (1999)
programme.sub-title: South Park: Bigger, Longer and Uncut (1999)
programme.desc: Kyle, Stan and Cartman orchestrate a resistance to an imminent war between Canada and the United States.

programme.title: Superhero Movie (2008)
programme.desc: A teenage loser (Drake Bell) transforms into a caped crusader when a bite from a genetically altered bug gives him superhuman abilities.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: Pixie sets out to avenge her mothers death and attempts a heist that will give her the means to leave her small-town life behind. When the plan goes horribly wrong, shes forced to team up with a pair of misfits who are clearly in over their heads.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: The Saint (1997)
programme.desc: A clever thief who is known as the master of creating false identities using the names of Catholic saints, is hired by the Russian Mafia for his next mission. But things get complicated when he falls for Emma Russel, the scientist.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Halls sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Picard (Patrick Stewart), Riker (Jonathan Frakes) and the others set off to stop the half-robot Borg from sabotaging the first warp drive flight in 2063.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane (2016)
programme.desc: A woman (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) discovers the horrifying truth about the outside world while living in an underground shelter with two men (John Goodman, John Gallagher Jr.).

programme.title: Murder Company (2024)
programme.desc: During the D-Day invasion, a group of U.S. soldiers must smuggle a member of the French resistance behind enemy lines to assassinate a high-value Nazi target.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls (1997)
programme.desc: After escaping from a serial killer, a doctor (Ashley Judd) helps police and a forensic psychologist (Morgan Freeman) track the madman.

programme.title: Southpaw (2015)
programme.desc: After losing everything to a senseless tragedy, a boxer (Jake Gyllenhaal) turns to a retired fighter (Forest Whitaker) for guidance as he struggles toward redemption.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: Pixie sets out to avenge her mothers death and attempts a heist that will give her the means to leave her small-town life behind. When the plan goes horribly wrong, shes forced to team up with a pair of misfits who are clearly in over their heads.

programme.title: Love, Rosie (2014)
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alexs family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: No Strings Attached (2011)
programme.desc: After sex enters the equation, two lifelong friends (Natalie Portman, Ashton Kutcher) make a pact to keep their relationship purely physical.

programme.title: The Romantics (2010)
programme.desc: Longtime rivalries resurface in the hours before a woman is scheduled to marry the former lover of her college roommate.

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: The Words (2012)
programme.desc: An aspiring writer pays a heavy price after he finds another mans long-lost manuscript and passes it off as his own.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert (2015)
programme.desc: Gertrude Bells life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: Becoming Jane (2007)
programme.desc: Though her parents expect her to marry a wealthy suitor, young Jane Austen (Anne Hathaway) becomes involved with a penniless lawyer (James McAvoy) who inspires her future writings.

programme.title: Sabrina (1995)
programme.desc: Sons (Harrison Ford, Greg Kinnear) of a Long Island tycoon become romantic rivals for the chauffeurs daughter (Julia Ormond).

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Shes the Man (2006)
programme.desc: Romantic complications ensue when a student poses as her twin brother and replaces him at his boarding school.

programme.title: Bottom of the 9th (2019)
programme.desc: After serving 17 years in prison for a violent mistake he made in his youth, a once-aspiring baseball player returns to his Bronx neighborhood.

programme.title: Shes All That (1999)
programme.desc: A cool teen (Freddie Prinze Jr.) bets a friend that he can transform the schools geekiest girl (Rachael Leigh Cook) into a prom queen.

programme.title: Rosemarys Baby (1968)
programme.desc: A pregnant womans (Mia Farrow) husband (John Cassavetes) and their satanic neighbors want her baby to be the Antichrist.

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Heatwave (2022)
programme.desc: A womans life takes an unexpected turn when she falls for her bosss wife. She must soon defend herself as she becomes entangled in a web of malice.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven (2005)
programme.desc: A San Francisco widower (Mark Ruffalo) falls in love with a ghostly doctor (Reese Witherspoon) while subletting her apartment.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: The Prince and Me (2004)
programme.desc: Paige, a premedical student, falls in love with Eddie, a Danish prince, who keeps his identity a secret.

programme.title: About Adam (2000)
programme.desc: A magnetic young man (Stuart Townsend) meets and romances an Irish waitress (Kate Hudson), then courts and beds the rest of the family.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: End of Sentence (2019)
programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mothers ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Ashby (2015)
programme.desc: After moving to a new town with his single mother (Sarah Silverman), a teen (Nat Wolff) befriends a retired CIA assassin (Mickey Rourke) who teaches him valuable life lessons.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Runaway Bride (1999)
programme.desc: A New York reporter (Richard Gere) travels to Maryland to profile a woman (Julia Roberts) who left three bridegrooms at the altar.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Featuring deep sea fishing, sea fly fishing and fishing charters in and around Cape Town.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The Bazaruto Archipelago in Mozambique is one of the most beautiful island groups on the planet. The team stay on a live aboard boat and explore this exceptional fishery from various locations in the archipelago.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the vibrant colors of autumn as we fish for trout in the serene lakes of WildFly Country. Experience the thrill of casting in picturesque settings, surrounded by stunning landscapes.

programme.title: Wild Fish Wild Places
programme.desc: Still on Lake Athabasca, Denis shifts his attention to his all-time favorite species, the northern pike; known for their savage strikes and explosive fights, these fish do not disappoint.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike is busy with his restaurants and Joe is heading out to find the very best of what spring offers in the UK with lobsters, crab and wild garlic.
